allow: PowerShell(Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Pictures\\Screenshots\\Captura de pantalla 2026-04-29 222012.png" 'docs\\images\\app-overview.png' -Force; Get-Item 'docs\\images\\app-overview.png' | Format-Table Name, Length -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Videos" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Length, LastWriteTime -AutoSize)

PowerShell($candidates = @\('C:\\Program Files\\obs-studio', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\obs-studio', 'C:\\Program Files\\ffmpeg', 'C:\\ffmpeg'\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $c"; Get-ChildItem $c -Filter 'ffmpeg.exe' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 2 FullName } }; Write-Host "---winget---"; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source)

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'docs\\videos' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Videos\\androidTesting.mkv" 'docs\\videos\\androidTesting.mkv' -Force; Get-Item 'docs\\videos\\androidTesting.mkv' | Format-Table Name, Length -AutoSize)
